title: EFT: Meaning Protest
description: Three practical clinician-facing slides extracted from the EFT interventions practice deck.

sources.label: Vrana and Greenberg, Overview of Emotion-Focused Therapy

slides.title: Marker: protest at violated meaning
slides.body: Use when grief is organized around what the event means.
bullets: Listen for 'Why this?', 'It should not be', 'What kind of world allows this?'
Validate the protest as contact with value and injury.

slides.title: Meaning creation sequence
slides.body: Keep one hand on the wound and one hand on the values the wound reveals.
steps: Let the protest speak fully before asking for perspective.
Ask what value was violated: love, fairness, dignity, safety, trust.
Name what was lost and what cannot be made acceptable.
Explore what remains worth protecting, honoring, or changing.
Formulate a next meaning that can be lived, not merely believed.

slides.title: Clinical discernment
rows: Find the need under the conclusion.
